meta.anchor_note: 知识维度使用 Level 1/4/7 三点锚点（与技能维度 2/4/6 不同，这是 O*NET 知识量表标准设计）。LLM 在最近锚点 ±1 分内内插输出最终分
meta.no_evidence_rule: score=null, confidence=无法判断, evidence=无相关证据
meta.primary_signal: 教育背景（专业方向、学位层级）为最强信号，其次为工作经历和项目经验

items.definition: Knowledge of business and management principles involved in strategic planning, resource allocation, human resources modeling, leadership technique, production methods, and coordination of people and resources.

anchors.description: Approve a reimbursement request
Monitor progress of a project to ensure timely completion
Manage a multimillion-dollar company

result.evidence: 管理跨职能小组9人（后端3、算法2、数据分析2、产品2），承担需求优先级和里程碑管理；作为业务BP与市场、运营、财务周会沟通，负责ROI复盘、预算申请、资源协调

items.definition: Knowledge of administrative and office procedures and systems such as word processing, managing files and records, stenography and transcription, designing forms, and workplace terminology.

anchors.description: Direct phone calls to the appropriate staff member
Type 30 words per minute
Organize a digital storage system for company forms

result.evidence: 推动北极星+二级指标树治理，发布口径字典216条

items.definition: Knowledge of economic and accounting principles and practices, the financial markets, banking, and the analysis and reporting of financial data.

anchors.description: Answer billing questions from credit card customers
Develop financial investment programs for individual clients
Keep a major corporation's financial records

result.evidence: 作为业务BP与市场、运营、财务周会沟通，负责ROI复盘、预算申请、资源协调；ROI从1.12提升到1.46，预算节省约920万元/季度

items.definition: Knowledge of principles and methods for showing, promoting, and selling products or services. This includes marketing strategy and tactics, product demonstration, sales techniques, and sales control systems.

anchors.description: Sell cakes at a bake sale
Introduce clients to a new line of products
Develop a marketing plan for a new nationwide high-speed internet system

result.evidence: 负责用户增长中台从0到1建设，统筹埋点规范、指标体系、看板体系、实验体系；搭建分层补贴模型，区分新客首单、沉默唤醒、价格敏感型三层用户

items.definition: Knowledge of principles and processes for providing customer and personal services. This includes customer needs assessment, meeting quality standards for services, and evaluation of customer satisfaction.

anchors.description: Process a customer's dry-cleaning drop off
Be responsible for 10 children at daycare
Respond to a citizen's request for assistance after a major disaster

result.evidence: 联合算法组建立商家健康评分与风险预警机制，输出自动化周报；商家客服投诉工单下降13%

items.definition: Knowledge of principles and procedures for personnel recruitment, selection, training, compensation and benefits, labor relations and negotiation, and personnel information systems.

anchors.description: Fill out a medical claim form
Interview applicants for an administrative position
Design a new personnel selection and promotion system for the Army

result.evidence: 管理跨职能小组9人（后端3、算法2、数据分析2、产品2），承担需求优先级和里程碑管理；PMP（在读）

sub_dimension.onet_category: 2.C.3 Engineering and Technology + 2.C.4.a/b/c/d Mathematics and Science

items.definition: Knowledge of circuit boards, processors, chips, electronic equipment, and computer hardware and software, including applications and programming.

anchors.description: Operate a media player to watch a training video
Use a computer to format a document
Create a program to scan a computer for viruses

result.evidence: 计算机科学与技术本科专业，具备Python、Java编程技能，有后端工程师工作经验，负责日志处理与报表服务，完成核心接口重构

items.definition: Knowledge of the practical application of engineering science and technology. This includes applying principles, techniques, procedures, and equipment to the design and production of various goods and services.

anchors.description: Install a door lock
Design a custom office chair
Plan for the impact of weather in designing a bridge

result.evidence: 作为数据产品负责人负责用户增长中台从0到1建设，统筹埋点规范、指标体系、看板体系、实验体系，具备系统化工程思维和实践经验

items.definition: Knowledge of design techniques, tools, and principles involved in production of precision technical plans, blueprints, drawings, and models.

anchors.description: Draw a straight line 4 3/16 inches long
Design plans for remodeling a kitchen
Develop detailed plans for a high-rise office building

result.evidence: 作为数据产品负责人负责指标统一治理，推动北极星+二级指标树治理，发布口径字典216条，具备系统化设计能力

items.definition: Knowledge of materials, methods, and the tools involved in the construction or repair of houses, buildings, or other structures such as highways and roads.

anchors.description: Choose the proper type of wood for adding a deck onto a house
Fix a plumbing leak in the ceiling
Build a high-rise office tower

result.evidence: 无相关证据

items.definition: Knowledge of machines and tools, including their designs, uses, repair, and maintenance.

anchors.description: Replace the filters in a furnace
Replace a valve on a steam pipe
Overhaul an airplane jet engine

result.evidence: 无相关证据

items.definition: Knowledge of arithmetic, algebra, geometry, calculus, statistics, and their applications.

anchors.description: Add two numbers
Analyze data to determine areas with the highest sales
Derive a complex mathematical equation

result.evidence: 应用统计专业硕士学位，具备LTV建模、RFM分层、漏斗分析等数学应用能力，搭建分层补贴模型区分不同用户群体

items.definition: Knowledge and prediction of physical principles, laws, their interrelationships, and applications to understanding fluid, material, and atmospheric dynamics, and mechanical, electrical, atomic and sub-atomic structures and processes.

anchors.description: Use a crowbar to pry open a box
Calculate the speed of a falling object
Design a cleaner burning gasoline engine

items.definition: Knowledge of the chemical composition, structure, and properties of substances and of the chemical processes and transformations that they undergo.

anchors.description: Use a common household bug spray
Use the proper concentration of chlorine to purify a water source

items.definition: Knowledge of plant and animal organisms, their tissues, cells, functions, interdependencies, and interactions with each other and the environment.

anchors.description: Feed domestic animals

result.evidence: 无直接生物学相关经验或教育背景

items.definition: Knowledge of human behavior and performance; individual differences in ability, personality, and interests; learning and motivation; psychological research methods; and the assessment and treatment of behavioral and affective disorders.

anchors.description: Monitor several children on a playground
Understand the impact of alcohol on human responses
Treat a person with a severe mental illness

items.definition: Knowledge of group behavior and dynamics, societal trends and influences, human migrations, ethnicity, cultures, and their history and origins.

anchors.description: Identify two cultures in a story as being different
Write an article about cultural differences
Create a new theory about the development of civilizations

items.definition: Knowledge of principles and methods for describing the features of land, sea, and air masses, including their physical characteristics, locations, interrelationships, and distribution of plant, animal, and human life.

anchors.description: Know the capital of the United States
Find a specific country on a world map

items.definition: Knowledge of the structure and content of a foreign (non-English) language including the meaning and spelling of words, rules of composition and grammar, and pronunciation.

anchors.description: Say "please" and "thank you" in a foreign language
Ask directions in a foreign city

items.definition: Knowledge of the theory and techniques required to compose, produce, and perform works of music, dance, visual arts, drama, and sculpture.

anchors.description: Attend a popular music concert

items.definition: Knowledge of historical events and their causes, indicators, and effects on civilizations and cultures.

items.definition: Knowledge of different philosophical systems and religions. This includes their basic principles, values, ethics, ways of thinking, customs, practices, and their impact on human culture.

items.definition: Knowledge of relevant equipment, policies, procedures, and strategies to promote effective local, state, or national security operations for the protection of people, data, property, and institutions.
